aboutScreen.title: About
aboutScreen.aboutBody: A Lightning wallet + Nostr client built for families. Connect your wallets, message friends, and zap them over Lightning.

accountSwitcherSheet.signOutMessage: Sign out of {{displayName}}? Other accounts stay signed in.
accountSwitcherSheet.subtitle: Tap an account to switch. All signed-in accounts stay warm so switching is instant.

addFriendSheet.permissionNeededMessage: Camera permission is required to scan QR codes.
addFriendSheet.title: Add Nostr Friend

addWalletWizard.errorAliasRequired: Please enter an alias for this wallet
addWalletWizard.cameraPermissionMessage: Camera access is needed to scan QR codes.
addWalletWizard.typePrompt: What type of wallet would you like to add?
addWalletWizard.a11yCreateCoinos: Create a managed Lightning wallet on CoinOS
addWalletWizard.coinosDesc: Auto-set-up a managed wallet on CoinOS in seconds. Custodial — best for getting started with small amounts.
addWalletWizard.a11yConnectExisting: Connect existing Lightning wallet via Nostr Wallet Connect
addWalletWizard.connectExistingDesc: Paste a Nostr Wallet Connect (NWC) string from a wallet you already use (Alby Hub, LNbits, Mutiny, Zeus, …).
addWalletWizard.onchainDesc: Import a watch-only wallet via an extended public key (xpub/ypub/zpub) or a single Bitcoin address
addWalletWizard.seedPhraseDesc: Import a 12 or 24 word mnemonic for a full hot wallet
addWalletWizard.nwcDescription: Paste or scan your Nostr Wallet Connect (NWC) connection string.
addWalletWizard.xpubDescription: Paste or scan an extended public key (xpub, ypub, or zpub) to track a whole HD wallet, or a single Bitcoin address (bc1…, 1…, 3…) to watch just that one.
addWalletWizard.a11yXpubInput: Extended public key or address input
addWalletWizard.mnemonicDescription: Enter your 12 or 24 word seed phrase. Numbers, colons, and extra whitespace will be stripped automatically.
addWalletWizard.aliasDescription: Give this wallet a name so you can easily identify it.
addWalletWizard.themeDescription: Choose a card design for this wallet.

appearanceScreen.title: Appearance
appearanceScreen.themeHint: Affects every screen in the app. "System" follows your device's light/dark setting and switches automatically when it changes.
appearanceScreen.languageHint: Translates the app's UI text. Currently active: {{language}}. Only a couple of screens are translated so far — more land in follow-up updates (#137).
appearanceScreen.animationHint: The animation shown while a payment is being sent. Both fade from purple to green when the payment succeeds.

btcMapAttribution.a11yLabel: Powered by BTC Map — opens btcmap.org

coinosRecoverySheet.title: Save your recovery info
coinosRecoverySheet.subtitle: If you lose this device, sign in to {{host}} with this username and password to recover your funds. Lightning Piggy doesn't store these for you anywhere else.

contactActionsSheet.writeToNfcTagUnsupported: Write to NFC tag (not supported on this device)

contactProfileScreen.noWalletMessage: Connect a Lightning wallet first to send zaps.
contactProfileScreen.noLightningAddressMessage: {{name}} hasn’t published a Lightning address, so they can’t receive zaps yet.
contactProfileScreen.shareSubtitle: They'll receive an encrypted Nostr DM with a person card.

conversationScreen.couldNotOpenLinkBody: No browser is available to open OpenStreetMap.
conversationScreen.sayHiZap: Say hi — or send a zap.
conversationScreen.zapUnavailable: Send a zap (unavailable — peer has no Lightning Address)
conversationScreen.shareContactSubtitle: They'll see it as a Nostr profile card they can open.

createCoinosWalletSheet.unreachableInstance: Could not reach that CoinOS instance. Check the URL and try again.
createCoinosWalletSheet.connectFailed: Lightning Piggy could not connect to the new CoinOS wallet.
createCoinosWalletSheet.genericError: Something went wrong creating your CoinOS wallet.
createCoinosWalletSheet.title: Create a Lightning wallet
createCoinosWalletSheet.subtitle: Lightning Piggy will set up a managed Lightning wallet for you on CoinOS so you can start sending and receiving in seconds — no setup, no seed phrase to write down today.
createCoinosWalletSheet.custodialWarningTitle: Heads-up: this is a custodial wallet
createCoinosWalletSheet.custodialWarningBody: Your funds will be held by CoinOS, not by you. Suitable for testing or small amounts — not life savings. You can move to self-custody whenever you're ready.
createCoinosWalletSheet.advancedToggleText: Advanced: use a self-hosted CoinOS instance
createCoinosWalletSheet.serverUrlHint: Leave as {{url}} for the public managed instance, or paste the URL of a CoinOS API server you trust. Include the `/api` path suffix — the bare host serves a frontend that won't accept register requests.
createCoinosWalletSheet.creatingHint: Picking a username, generating a strong password, and minting a Nostr Wallet Connect connection. This usually takes a few seconds.
createCoinosWalletSheet.errorUsernameTaken: CoinOS rejected the auto-generated username. Tap Create again to retry with a fresh one.
createCoinosWalletSheet.errorRateLimited: CoinOS is rate-limiting registrations right now. Try again in a minute.
createCoinosWalletSheet.errorServiceDown: CoinOS appears to be down. Try again in a few minutes.
createCoinosWalletSheet.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach CoinOS. Check your connection and try again.
createCoinosWalletSheet.errorTimeout: CoinOS took too long to respond. Try again.
createCoinosWalletSheet.errorAuth: CoinOS rejected the request — please report this to Lightning Piggy support.

createGroupSheet.membersRequiredMessage: Please select at least one member.
createGroupSheet.createFailedMessage: Failed to save the group locally. Try again or restart the app.
createGroupSheet.noFriendsYet: Add Nostr friends first to include them in a group.

editProfileSheet.profileUpdatedMessage: Your Nostr profile has been published.
editProfileSheet.publishFailed: Failed to publish profile. Please try again.
editProfileSheet.title: Edit Profile
editProfileSheet.safetyTip: Tip: You don't need to use your real name or photo for your profile.

eventDetailScreen.notInFeed: This event isn't in our local feed anymore. Reload the Events page to refetch.

eventsFilterSheet.title: Filters
eventsFilterSheet.safetyHint: Only events from organisers your trust graph reaches are shown — tap the chip to widen the tier.

eventsScreen.locationPermissionRequired: Location permission required to discover nearby events. We use a coarse 5 km area, not your exact location.
eventsScreen.creatingEventsSoonBody: For now publish your meetup via Flockstr or Coracle — it shows up here automatically.
eventsScreen.headerTagline: Bitcoin meetups and gatherings near you
eventsScreen.lookingForEvents: Looking for Bitcoin events near you…
eventsScreen.emptyStateBody: Bitcoin meetups, conferences and similar gatherings published as NIP-52 calendar events show up here. Try widening your search by travelling — or organise one!
eventsScreen.noSearchMatches: Nothing matches “{{query}}”. Try a city, hashtag, or organiser name.

exploreMiniMap.allowLocationBody: We use a coarse 5 km area to find merchants, caches, and meetups around you. Nothing leaves your device beyond that.

feedbackSheet.subtitle: Your message will be sent as an encrypted Nostr DM to the Lightning Piggy team.

friendsScreen.noLightningAddressMessage: {{name}} hasn’t published a Lightning address, so they can’t receive zaps yet.

fullscreenImageModal.backdropLabel: Full-screen image (pinch to zoom, tap to close)

groupConversationScreen.couldNotOpenLinkMessage: No browser is available to open OpenStreetMap.
groupConversationScreen.groupDeleted: This group may have been deleted.
groupConversationScreen.leaveGroupMessage: Remove "{{name}}" from this device? Other members will keep the group; you can be re-added if they message you again.
groupConversationScreen.zapUnavailable: Send a zap (unavailable — no single recipient in a group)
groupConversationScreen.shareContactSubtitle: They'll see it as a Nostr profile card they can open.

groupMembersSheet.removeMessage: {{name}} will no longer be in this group. They'll keep any messages they've already received.
groupMembersSheet.pickFriendSubtitle: Pick a friend to add to this group

groupsScreen.title: Groups
groupsScreen.followingFilterOnA11y: Following-only filter on. Tap to show all groups.
groupsScreen.followingFilterOffA11y: Following-only filter off. Tap to filter to followed members only.
groupsScreen.followingIndicatorA11y: Showing groups with at least one followed member
groupsScreen.noGroupsSubtitle: Create a group to chat with multiple friends at once.

huntCreateScreen.localRecordMissing: Local record missing — it may have been removed from this device.
huntCreateScreen.pasteLnurlFirstBody: Create the link in your wallet, then paste it here.
huntCreateScreen.savedLocallyDropPin: Saved locally — drop a pin to publish
huntCreateScreen.savedLocallyDropPinBody: Public Piggies need a location pin so finders can discover them.
huntCreateScreen.couldNotSignListingBody: Sign-in / Amber declined. Saved locally; retry publish later.
huntCreateScreen.locationPermissionBody: Location is needed to drop a pin at the cache.
huntCreateScreen.saveStlPrompt: Pick where to save the 3D-print file.
huntCreateScreen.libraryPermissionBody: Allow photo library access to attach a hint photo.
huntCreateScreen.cameraPermissionBody: Allow camera access to take a hint photo.
huntCreateScreen.savePinNowBody: The tag is locked, but we couldn't find the Piglet record to save its PIN onto. Copy the PIN from the card below before you leave this screen.
huntCreateScreen.pinNotSaved: PIN not saved to this device
huntCreateScreen.pinNotSavedBody: The tag is locked, but we couldn't write the PIN to local storage ({{message}}). Copy the PIN from the card below before you leave this screen — otherwise you'll need an external NFC writer to recover the tag.
huntCreateScreen.step1Subtitle: A Piglet lives on a physical artefact. Make or buy one.
huntCreateScreen.needAPhysicalPiggyHelper: A Piglet lives on a physical artefact — a 3D-printed charm with an NFC tag, or a sticker with a QR. Make one yourself, or buy a ready-made charm from Robotechy.
huntCreateScreen.bagCharmPhotoAlt: Pink 3D-printed Lightning Piggy bag charm with NFC keyring
huntCreateScreen.tagChipsHint: NTAG215 / 216 recommended (≥504 B fits the full multi-record write). NTAG213 / Mifare Ultralight C work but only fit a single record. Avoid Mifare Classic — it can't lock.
huntCreateScreen.step2Subtitle: A withdraw link from your wallet — the sats the finder claims. (Video URL prize coming soon.)
huntCreateScreen.crossDeviceBanner: No LNURL on this device — paste a fresh withdraw link to re-write the tag, or skip step 6 to update the listing only.
huntCreateScreen.createWithdrawLinkHelper: Create a withdraw link in your own wallet (LNbits, Alby, Mutiny, …) — set the per-claim amount, daily limit, and total uses there — then paste it here.
huntCreateScreen.skipPrizeAccessibility: Skip prize and publish without a reward
huntCreateScreen.noRewardBody: This Piglet is just for the find — no sats attached. You can add a withdraw link above any time before publishing.
huntCreateScreen.linkOnAnotherDevice: Link set up on another device
huntCreateScreen.linkOnAnotherDeviceBody: This Piglet's withdraw link lives on the phone you created it on. You can still edit the prize, cooldown and uses below.
huntCreateScreen.cooldownUsesHelper: These mirror your wallet's wait_time + uses settings — finders see them as soft hints. The wallet still does the actual enforcement.
huntCreateScreen.step6Subtitle: Write the prize link onto an NFC tag the finder will tap.
huntCreateScreen.lockHelperIos: iOS doesn't yet support the chip-level lock — your tag will go out unlocked regardless of this toggle. Lock from an Android phone or NFC Tools to protect it.
huntCreateScreen.lockHelperOn: Generates a random PIN and writes it to the tag so others can't overwrite the prize link. The PIN appears below after the write.
huntCreateScreen.lockHelperOff: Leaves the tag open — anyone with an NFC writer can replace the contents. Only turn this off if you'll re-lock manually.
huntCreateScreen.noLnurlYetHelper: No LNURL yet — paste a fresh withdraw link on step 2 to enable the tag write. Or skip this step: the listing already saved without touching the tag.
huntCreateScreen.pinHelper: Keep this safe. You'll need it to unlock the tag (e.g. to repoint it to a different Piggy). If you lose it, the tag stays locked forever.
huntCreateScreen.step3Subtitle: Stash the Piglet first, then drop a pin where you hid it.
huntCreateScreen.locationHelper: Stored locally so the Piggy shows in your My Piglets list — you can track who's found it and find it again yourself. The location is only published to Nostr (as the kind 37516 `g` tag) if you toggle Public on step 6. Leave it private and the Piggy is a physical-only treasure — found only by tapping the tag — ideal for a gift or family Piggy you don't want strangers hunting.
huntCreateScreen.step4Subtitle: The finder-facing listing — a photo, a name, and how tough it is to reach.
huntCreateScreen.exifHelper: EXIF data (incl. GPS) is stripped before upload. Pick a clue photo, not a photo taken at the cache itself.
huntCreateScreen.descriptionPlaceholder: A line or two for finders — what makes this spot worth the trip.
huntCreateScreen.hintHelper: A light clue a stuck hunter can reveal — not a secret. It's stored lightly obfuscated (ROT13) on the relay, so don't put anything sensitive here.
huntCreateScreen.hintPlaceholder: e.g. Behind the third fence post, under the flat rock.
huntCreateScreen.difficultyHelper: How tricky the cache is to find — 1 easy, 5 very hard.
huntCreateScreen.terrainHelper: How rough the journey is — 1 easy walk, 5 needs gear.
huntCreateScreen.sizeHelper: Micro (matchbox) · Small (sandwich box) · Regular (ammo can) · Large (bucket) · Other (custom container).
huntCreateScreen.typeHelper: Traditional (the tag is the cache) · Multi (several waypoints to reach it) · Mystery (solve a puzzle for the coordinates) · Virtual (just head to the spot — nothing to tag).
huntCreateScreen.expiresAfterHelper: Relays drop the listing once it expires — anyone searching for nearby caches won't see it. You can re-publish at any time to extend the window. "Never" leaves the cache up indefinitely (only use this if you're actively maintaining the tag).
huntCreateScreen.step5Subtitle: Write the cache to Nostr — finder-facing message, rules and visibility.
huntCreateScreen.publicSubOn: Published to Nostr relays as a kind 37516 event — anyone can see the location and hunt it. Nostr has no private events, so once it is out, treat it as public.
huntCreateScreen.publicSubOff: Stays on this device only — never sent to a relay. Found purely by physically tapping the tag. Best for a private gift or family Piggy.
huntCreateScreen.bearerTokenWarning: ⚠ The URL on your Piggy is a bearer token — anyone who finds the tag (or sees the URL) can claim sats up to your daily limit. Set a per-find amount you're OK losing if it leaks.
huntCreateScreen.addPrizeOnStep2: Add a prize on step 2 — or skip it there to publish a no-reward cache.
huntCreateScreen.cameraAccessNeeded: Camera access needed to scan a QR code.
huntCreateScreen.pointAtLnurlQr: Point at an LNURL QR code

huntCreateWizardChrome.ntag215Desc: — fit the multi-record payload + the reversible PWD/PACK lock.
huntCreateWizardChrome.ntag213Desc: — only 144 bytes of user memory, too small for the Hide-a-Piglet payload.
huntCreateWizardChrome.ntag424Desc: — not supported yet (needs AES auth, GH #558).

huntFilterSheet.type_traditional: Walk to the geohash, find the container
huntFilterSheet.type_multi: Multi-stage: solve clues to reach the final
huntFilterSheet.type_mystery: Puzzle to solve before the coords make sense
huntFilterSheet.type_virtual: No physical container — just visit the spot
huntFilterSheet.type_event: Geocaching meet-up at a time + place
huntFilterSheet.type_webcam: Pose in front of a public webcam
huntFilterSheet.sectionHint: An unverified geo-cache can be a lure — tap the chip to choose which trust tier should pass.

huntFoundScreen.cooldownNoHint: Cooldown is still running, or the sats budget is used up. Try again later.
huntFoundScreen.claimedRecently: Another finder claimed recently — try again in {{pretty}}.
huntFoundScreen.noWalletConnected: No wallet connected — add a Lightning wallet (NWC) first, then try again.
huntFoundScreen.cantClaimWholeSats: This prize can't be claimed in whole sats.
huntFoundScreen.sentToActiveWallet: Sent to your active wallet — the celebration toast fires the moment they land.

huntScreen.tagline: Hunt for sats hidden in the wild
huntScreen.noMatch: Nothing matches “{{query}}”. Try a cache type, size, or location keyword.
huntScreen.emptyPrefix: We searched a ~5 km area. Tap
huntScreen.emptySuffix: above to hide the first Piglet.

legendSheet.categoriesSub: Icons used on Places pins in the current viewport.

liveLocationDurationPicker.title: Share location
liveLocationDurationPicker.body: Send your current spot once, or share live updates for a set time.
liveLocationDurationPicker.liveSub: Auto-stops at the end. You can stop earlier from the bubble.
liveLocationDurationPicker.footnote: Sharing live location uses extra battery. End-to-end encrypted. Recipient sees a map that updates every ~30 seconds.

lnurlWithdrawSheet.noLightningWallet: No Lightning wallet connected — add one first, then try again.
lnurlWithdrawSheet.cantClaimWholeSats: This voucher's amount can't be claimed in whole sats.
lnurlWithdrawSheet.sentToWallet: Sent to your wallet — the celebration fires when they land.
lnurlWithdrawSheet.voucherClaimedRecently: This voucher was claimed recently — it unlocks when the timer hits zero. Scan again then.
lnurlWithdrawSheet.cooldownNoHint: Cooldown is still running, or the sats budget is used up. Try again later.

locationPickerSheet.dragPinToMark: Drag the pin — or tap the map — to mark the exact spot.
locationPickerSheet.tapOrDragToMark: Tap or drag the pin to mark a location

mapScreen.locationRequiredSubtitle: We use your location to show nearby Bitcoin merchants. Grant location access in Settings to enable this map.
mapScreen.title: Map
mapScreen.verifyListing: Verify this listing on BTC Map
mapScreen.suggestEditLabel: Suggest an edit on BTC Map
mapScreen.trustExplain: Only caches from hiders you trust at the current tier appear on the map. Tap the chip to widen the tier.
mapScreen.categoriesHint: Tap to narrow to one or more BTC Map categories.

merchantDetailSheet.verifyOnBtcMap: Verify this listing on BTC Map
merchantDetailSheet.suggestEditOnBtcMap: Suggest an edit on BTC Map

messageActionsSheet.zapMessageA11y: Send a zap for this message
messageActionsSheet.reactionFailedBody: Could not publish your reaction. Check your relays and try again.

messageBubble.secretModeSenderMemo: Lightning Piggy will offer the recipient a button to toggle Secret Mode.
messageBubble.secretModeReceiverMemo: Unlocks dev / power-user surfaces in Lightning Piggy.

messagesScreen.title: Messages
messagesScreen.windowToggleA11y: Window: last {{days}} days. Tap to change.
messagesScreen.hideZapCounterparties: Hide zap counterparties from the inbox
messagesScreen.showZapCounterparties: Show zap counterparties in the inbox
messagesScreen.connectNostrSubtitle: Connect your Nostr identity to see your conversations here.
messagesScreen.noConversationsSubtitle: Zap a friend or tap + to start one.

myPigletsScreen.headerTagline: What you've hidden, found, and what your friends are claiming
myPigletsScreen.emptyHidden: You haven't hidden a Piglet yet. Tap "Hide a Piglet" to set one up.
myPigletsScreen.emptyFound: No finds yet — claim a Piglet on the Geo-caches page and it'll show up here.
myPigletsScreen.emptyFriendsFinds: No friends have claimed a Piglet yet. Their finds show up here as they happen.
myPigletsScreen.privateBadgeA11y: Private — saved on this device, found by tapping its tag (not published)
myPigletsScreen.cantRepublishBody: Original LNURL not on this device — re-add the Piglet to republish.
myPigletsScreen.republishBody: Re-emits the listing to relays with a fresh expiration. Your secret LNURL stays on-device.

nearbyScreen.title: Nearby merchants
nearbyScreen.locationPermissionMessage: Granting "While in use" location is the first step before we can ask for "Always".
nearbyScreen.backgroundLocationMessage: Without "Always" location, we can't alert you near merchants while the app is in your pocket. Open Settings to enable it, or leave this feature off.
nearbyScreen.notificationsMessage: Geofence alerts need notification permission so we can tell you when you walk past a merchant.
nearbyScreen.noNearbyMerchantsMessage: We couldn't find any Bitcoin-accepting merchants near your current location. Move closer to a city centre and toggle this on again.
nearbyScreen.geofencingOn: Geofencing is on — we'll alert you when you walk near a merchant.
nearbyScreen.geofencingOff: Off. Turn this on to opt in to background-location alerts.
nearbyScreen.quietHoursSub: No alerts during the window even when you walk past a merchant.
nearbyScreen.privacyHint: Geofences run on your device. Your live location never leaves your phone — we only send a coarse bounding box (≈ 2 km) to BTC Map at most every 500 m of movement.

nfcReadSheet.wrongPiglet: This tag belongs to a different Piglet. Make sure you're scanning the right one.
nfcReadSheet.noPrizeLink: No prize link on this tag. The hider may have written a tag without an LNURL.
nfcReadSheet.noWalletConnected: No wallet connected — add a Lightning wallet (NWC) first, then try again.
nfcReadSheet.nfcTurnedOff: NFC is turned off. Please enable NFC in your device settings.
nfcReadSheet.title: Try the prize
nfcReadSheet.holdPiglet: Hold the Piglet to the back of your phone
nfcReadSheet.willReadTag: We'll read the tag and try to claim the sats prize automatically.
nfcReadSheet.sentToWallet: Sent to your chosen wallet — the receive toast fires the moment they land.
nfcReadSheet.anotherFinder: Another finder beat you to the trough. The Piggy wakes back up when the timer hits zero.
nfcReadSheet.piggyIsUp: Piggy is up — tap Try Again!
nfcReadSheet.troughEmpty: The trough's empty, or the cooldown is still running. Try again later.

nfcUnlockSheet.nfcOffAndroid: NFC is turned off. Please enable NFC in your device settings.
nfcUnlockSheet.nfcOffIos: NFC is turned off. Go to Settings to enable NFC.
nfcUnlockSheet.title: Unlock the Piglet tag
nfcUnlockSheet.holdPiglet: Hold the Piglet to the back of your phone
nfcUnlockSheet.readyDesc: This sends the PIN to the tag and removes the rewrite lock. After unlocking, the tag accepts a fresh write from any NFC writer.
nfcUnlockSheet.successDesc: The tag is rewriteable again. Run the Hide-a-Piglet wizard if you want to repoint it to a new Piggy.

nfcWriteSheet.nfcOffAndroid: NFC is turned off. Please enable NFC in your device settings.
nfcWriteSheet.nfcOffIos: NFC is turned off. Go to Settings to enable NFC.
nfcWriteSheet.writeFailedGeneric: Failed to write to NFC tag
nfcWriteSheet.holdPiglet: Hold the Piglet to the back of your phone
nfcWriteSheet.holdPhone: Hold your phone against an NFC tag
nfcWriteSheet.readyDescPigletIos: This writes the prize link onto the tag. iOS doesn't support our reversible lock yet, so the chip stays open — anyone with an NFC writer could repoint it.
nfcWriteSheet.readyDescPigletLocked: This writes the prize link onto the tag and password-locks the chip so no-one can overwrite it. Keep the Piglet still against the phone until it confirms.
nfcWriteSheet.readyDescPigletUnlocked: This writes the prize link onto the tag and leaves the chip open. Anyone with an NFC writer can later overwrite it — turn on Lock the tag on the previous screen to password-protect.
nfcWriteSheet.readyDescNpub: This will write {{name}}'s Nostr identity (npub) to the tag. Anyone with a Nostr-compatible app can tap the tag to view the profile.
nfcWriteSheet.successDescPigletLocked: The prize link is on the tag and the chip is password-protected so no-one can overwrite it. Save the PIN below — you’ll need it to repoint the tag later.
nfcWriteSheet.successDescPigletIos: The prize link is on the tag. iOS doesn't support our reversible lock yet, so the chip is left open — anyone with an NFC writer could later repoint it.
nfcWriteSheet.successDescPigletUnlocked: The prize link is on the tag. Anyone with an NFC writer can still overwrite it — flip the Lock toggle on the previous screen to password-protect this chip on a re-write.
nfcWriteSheet.successDescNpub: {{name}}'s npub has been written to the NFC tag. Anyone can now tap this tag to view the profile.

nostrLoginSheet.copiedMessage: Your private key has been copied. Store it somewhere safe!
nostrLoginSheet.nip46SubtitleIos: Open your bunker app (Clave, Aegis, nsec.app) and scan this QR. We'll wait up to 2 minutes for the connection.
nostrLoginSheet.nip46SubtitleAndroid: Open your bunker app (Aegis, Nowser, nsec.app) and scan this QR. We'll wait up to 2 minutes for the connection.
nostrLoginSheet.nip46CopiedMessage: Pairing URI copied. Paste it into your bunker app.
nostrLoginSheet.nip46TookTooLong: Pairing took too long — try again
nostrLoginSheet.connectSubtitle: Enter your private key to connect your Nostr identity.
nostrLoginSheet.createAccountSubtitle: Choose a display name for your new Nostr identity.
nostrLoginSheet.safetyTip: Tip: You don't need to use your real name or photo.
nostrLoginSheet.backupWarning: Save your private key somewhere safe. If you lose it, you cannot recover your account.

nostrScreen.title: Nostr
nostrScreen.relaysHint: Green dot = currently connected. NIP-65 relays come from your published kind-10002 list; defaults are baked into the app and always tried as a fallback. Add your own relays above — they’re saved on this device and used for the next subscription / publish.
nostrScreen.geoCacheRelaysHint: Dedicated relays for Piglets and other geo-caches (NIP-GC). These mirror what the treasures.to web app reads and searches, so your Piglets stay discoverable on the web. They’re always used for geo-cache publishing and reading, in addition to any relays you add above.
nostrScreen.blossomHint: Hosts images you send in chats and set as your profile picture. Any Blossom (BUD-01/BUD-02) server works — e.g. blossom.primal.net or nostr.build.
nostrScreen.amberPermissionHint: Amber hasn’t granted NIP-44 decrypt permission to this app yet — tap below to grant it. One dialog, then subsequent encrypted messages decrypt silently. Messages from people you don’t follow stay hidden either way.
nostrScreen.noProfilePubkey: No profile pubkey — log in first.
nostrScreen.amberRoundTripMismatch: Amber round-trip mismatch — permission may not be set.

offlineBanner.a11yLabel: You're offline. Some data may be stale.
offlineBanner.bannerText: You're offline — some data may be stale

onChainScreen.title: On-chain
onChainScreen.hint: On-chain wallets use this Electrum server to read balances and broadcast transactions. Point this at your own server if you don't want to leak addresses to a public one.

paymentProgressOverlay.connectionLostSubtitle: We couldn't reach your wallet to confirm. Your payment may still have gone through — check your balance before trying again.
paymentProgressOverlay.swapInProgressSubtitle: Swaps take a little longer to settle. Safe to close — it finishes in the background and appears in your transactions.
paymentProgressOverlay.stillInFlightSubtitle: This is taking longer than usual to settle. The result will appear in your transactions once it does.

placesScreen.noPlacesNearbyHint: We searched a ~100 km area. Try opening the full map to pan further afield, or refresh later — the OSM merchant list updates daily.
placesScreen.gettingLocation: Getting your location to sort nearby places…
placesScreen.noMatch: Nothing matches “{{query}}”. Try a city or street name.

secretModeCelebration.bodyEnabled: You've unlocked the hidden surfaces — hot-wallet import, the Following-only chip on Messages and Groups, the Web-of-Trust wider tiers, and other debug widgets.
secretModeCelebration.bodyDisabled: Hidden surfaces are tucked away again. Restart if any toggle still appears.

securityScreen.presetOffSub: Never confirm — every send is one-tap
securityScreen.preset10kSub: ~£5 — default; confirm at or above this
securityScreen.title: Security
securityScreen.confirmLargeSendsHint: Show an "Are you sure?" prompt before dispatching a Lightning payment or wallet transfer at or above this many sats. Smaller sends stay one-tap. Default: 10,000 sats.
securityScreen.linkPreviewsHint: When ON, your phone fetches a preview card (title, image, summary) for any URL shared in a message — automatically, as the message renders, even if you never tap it. The fetch tells the URL's host that someone is previewing the page. Turn OFF if you'd rather keep that traffic private. Default: ON.
securityScreen.notificationContentHint: When OFF, notifications tell you a message or payment arrived but never include the details — you'll see "New message" rather than the text, and "Payment received" rather than the amount, both on the lock screen and in the notification shade. Turn ON to include the full content. Default: OFF.
securityScreen.showMessagePaymentDetailsA11y: Show message and payment details in notifications
securityScreen.backgroundNotificationsHint: When ON, Lightning Piggy keeps watching for new messages even when the app is closed, so you're notified the moment one arrives — no Google services or push server involved. This shows a permanent "watching for messages" notification you can't swipe away, and uses extra battery because it holds a live connection to your relays. Turn OFF to rely on periodic checks instead. Default: OFF.
securityScreen.watchForMessages: Watch for messages in the background

sendNfcPane.nfcTurnedOff: NFC is turned off. Please enable NFC in your device settings.
sendNfcPane.nfcUnavailable: NFC isn't available on this device.
sendNfcPane.holdTag: Hold the tag to the back of your phone
sendNfcPane.readInstructions: We'll read a Lightning invoice, address or LNURL from the tag automatically.

sendScanPane.cameraAccessNeeded: Camera access needed to scan QR codes

sendSheet.claimCodeBody: This tag holds a withdraw (claim) code, not a payment request. Use Receive to claim it.
sendSheet.notPaymentTagBody: This tag holds a Nostr profile, not a payment request.
sendSheet.unsupportedTagBody: Couldn't find a Lightning invoice, address or LNURL on this tag.
sendSheet.confirmLargeSendBody: You're about to send {{amount}} sats{{fiat}} to {{recipient}}. Tap Confirm to proceed.
sendSheet.detailsNotResolved: Payment details not resolved yet. Please wait.
sendSheet.pastePlaceholder: Paste invoice, lightning or bitcoin address...
sendSheet.goLabel: Go — process pasted invoice or address
sendSheet.resetLabel: Scan or paste a different invoice

tipSheet.instructions: Show this to your parent or guardian. They can scan the QR code to send you a tip as a reward for completing this course!
tipSheet.quizTitle: Be prepared to explain these topics:

transactionDetailSheet.retryKickedOffMessage: Any claimable swaps are being re-broadcast.
transactionDetailSheet.swapFailedBody: This swap ended at status {{status}} and can’t complete. Any locked funds auto-refund through Boltz; if you don’t see the refund, message Boltz support with the swap ID below.
transactionDetailSheet.swapCompleteIncomingBody: Boltz received your on-chain payment and settled the Lightning side — funds are in your Lightning wallet.
transactionDetailSheet.swapCompleteOutgoingBody: Lightning was paid and Boltz’s on-chain lockup has been claimed to your Bitcoin address.
transactionDetailSheet.needsAttentionBody: Lightning was paid and the Boltz lockup confirmed, but the on-chain claim hasn’t broadcast yet. Your funds are safe — tap Retry claim below if it hasn’t cleared.
transactionDetailSheet.claimBroadcastingBody: Boltz has locked funds on-chain. The claim transaction is broadcasting and usually confirms in a few minutes.
transactionDetailSheet.swapInProgressWaitingBody: Waiting for the Lightning leg of this swap to settle…
transactionDetailSheet.supportIntro: I have a question about this transaction:
transactionDetailSheet.retryInfo: Retry re-runs the swap recovery service, which will re-broadcast the claim transaction from persisted swap state.
transactionDetailSheet.feedbackSubtitle: Your message will be sent as an encrypted Nostr DM to the Boltz team.
transactionDetailSheet.feedbackSuccessMessage: Boltz support will reply via Nostr DM. Check your usual Nostr client for the response.

unsupportedEntityScreen.message: Lightning Piggy doesn't support {{entity}} yet. You can open it in a dedicated Nostr client, or head back to the app.

voiceRecordingSheet.micAccessNeededSettings: Lightning Piggy needs microphone permission to record voice notes. Open Settings to grant it.
voiceRecordingSheet.micAccessNeededGrant: Voice notes need microphone access. You can grant it any time from system Settings.
voiceRecordingSheet.tooLargeMessage: Voice note too large ({{size}} MB). Maximum is 5 MB. Try recording a shorter clip.
voiceRecordingSheet.hintRecording: Recording... tap stop when you're done (max {{max}}s)
voiceRecordingSheet.hintFinalised: Tap play to listen back, then Send
voiceRecordingSheet.hintRecordAgain: Tap the mic to record again
voiceRecordingSheet.hintStart: Tap the mic to start recording
voiceRecordingSheet.title: Voice note
voiceRecordingSheet.encryptionNote: End-to-end encrypted (AES-256-GCM): the audio is encrypted on your device before upload, so only you and the recipient can play it.

walletSettingsSheet.title: Wallet Settings
walletSettingsSheet.lightningAddressHint: LUD-16 address for receiving payments. Usually provided by the NWC connection.
walletSettingsSheet.recoveryInfoBody: Lightning Piggy keeps these securely on this device, but a phone wipe loses access. Save them somewhere safe (a password manager, written down) so you can sign back in to {{host}} and recover your funds.
walletSettingsSheet.nwcQrHint: Scan from another Lightning Piggy install or NWC client to import this wallet.
walletSettingsSheet.nwcConnectionHint: Use this string to move the wallet to another device or NWC client.
walletSettingsSheet.removeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove "{{alias}}"?
walletSettingsSheet.disconnectConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to disconnect "{{alias}}"?
walletSettingsSheet.xpubCopied: Extended public key copied to clipboard.

walletsScreen.title: Wallets
walletsScreen.noWallets: No wallets connected. Add one to get started.
walletsScreen.removeWalletMessage: Remove "{{alias}}"? This will disconnect the wallet.

webOfTrustBottomSheet.locked: Locked. Stick to Friends for now.
webOfTrustBottomSheet.title: Web of Trust
webOfTrustBottomSheet.explainer: We filter out unverified senders, cache hiders, and event organisers — anyone could publish a phishing message or set up a physical lure, so by default you only see content from people in your trust graph.
webOfTrustBottomSheet.fofSubtitle: Not yet implemented — coming soon. We're working out how to download and cache the extended graph without freezing the app.
webOfTrustBottomSheet.allSubtitle: Everything from every relay. Default until your trust graph is ready — switch to Friends to tighten.
webOfTrustBottomSheet.gateHint: Friends-of-friends is temporarily disabled while we rework the trust-graph compute (#565). Friends is the safest feed; All is the broadest.

welcomeWalletPrompt.title: Welcome to Lightning Piggy
welcomeWalletPrompt.subtitle: Add a Lightning wallet to start sending and receiving sats.
